attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_ITM_ENTITY_ATTR_EXT.ENTITY_EXTENSION_ID, STG_CG1_ITM_ENTITY_ATTR_EXT.ENTITY, STG_CG1_ITM_ENTITY_ATTR_EXT.ENTITY_ATTRIBUTE_GROUP, STG_CG1_ITM_ENTITY_ATTR_EXT.ENTITY_VALUE, STG_CG1_ITM_ENTITY_ATTR_EXT.C_EXT_ATTR1, STG_CG1_ITM_ENTITY_ATTR_EXT.C_EXT_ATTR2, STG_CG1_ITM_ENTITY_ATTR_EXT.C_EXT_ATTR3, STG_CG1_ITM_ENTITY_ATTR_EXT.C_EXT_ATTR4, STG_CG1_ITM_ENTITY_ATTR_EXT.C_EXT_ATTR5, STG_CG1_ITM_ENTITY_ATTR_EXT.C_EXT_ATTR6, STG_CG1_ITM_ENTITY_ATTR_EXT.C_EXT_ATTR7, STG_CG1_ITM_ENTITY_ATTR_EXT.C_EXT_ATTR8, STG_CG1_ITM_ENTITY_ATTR_EXT.C_EXT_ATTR9, STG_CG1_ITM_ENTITY_ATTR_EXT.C_EXT_ATTR10, STG_CG1_ITM_ENTITY_ATTR_EXT.N_EXT_ATTR1, STG_CG1_ITM_ENTITY_ATTR_EXT.N_EXT_ATTR2, STG_CG1_ITM_ENTITY_ATTR_EXT.N_EXT_ATTR3, STG_CG1_ITM_ENTITY_ATTR_EXT.N_EXT_ATTR4, STG_CG1_ITM_ENTITY_ATTR_EXT.N_EXT_ATTR5, STG_CG1_ITM_ENTITY_ATTR_EXT.N_EXT_ATTR6, STG_CG1_ITM_ENTITY_ATTR_EXT.N_EXT_ATTR7, STG_CG1_ITM_ENTITY_ATTR_EXT.N_EXT_ATTR8, STG_CG1_ITM_ENTITY_ATTR_EXT.N_EXT_ATTR9, STG_CG1_ITM_ENTITY_ATTR_EXT.N_EXT_ATTR10, STG_CG1_ITM_ENTITY_ATTR_EXT.D_EXT_ATTR1, STG_CG1_ITM_ENTITY_ATTR_EXT.D_EXT_ATTR2, STG_CG1_ITM_ENTITY_ATTR_EXT.D_EXT_ATTR3, STG_CG1_ITM_ENTITY_ATTR_EXT.D_EXT_ATTR4, STG_CG1_ITM_ENTITY_ATTR_EXT.D_EXT_ATTR5, STG_CG1_ITM_ENTITY_ATTR_EXT.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_ITM_ENTITY_ATTR_EXT.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_ITM_ENTITY_ATTR_EXT.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_ITM_ENTITY_ATTR_EXT.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_ITM_ENTITY_ATTR_EXT.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, STG_CG1_ITM_ENTITY_ATTR_EXT.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_ITM_ENTITY_ATTR_EXT.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_ITM_ENTITY_ATTR_EXT.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_ITM_ENTITY_ATTR_EXT.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_ITM_ENTITY_ATTR_EXT.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
$$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_ITM_ENTITY_ATTR_EXT STG_CG1_ITM_ENTITY_ATTR_EXT,
(
 select ENTITY_EXTENSION_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_ITM_ENTITY_ATTR_EXT
 minus
 select ENTITY_EXTENSION_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_ITM_ENTITY_ATTR_EXT
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.ENTITY_EXTENSION_ID = STG_CG1_ITM_ENTITY_ATTR_EXT.ENTITY_EXTENSION_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_ITM_ENTITY_ATTR_EXT.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXITM_ENTITY_ATTR_EXT)
